game_meta.name: Street Fighter 6
game_meta.tagline: 1v1 2D fighting game. Best-of-3 rounds. Drive system + Modern/Classic control schemes.
game_meta.character_vocab: characters (22+ roster), played on Classic (full inputs) or Modern (simplified) controls
game_meta.round_format: Best of 3 rounds (FT2). Each round ~99 seconds in-game.
key_mechanics: Drive Gauge — Drive Rush, Drive Impact, Drive Parry, Drive Reversal, OD (super) versions
Burnout state — when Drive Gauge empties, you take chip damage + lose throw escapes
Drive Rush cancel from normals for combo extensions
Charge vs motion inputs (Guile/Honda vs Ryu/Ken)

Shoto.notes: Ryu, Ken, Luke. Hadoken + DP + tatsu. Classic toolkit.

Rushdown.notes: Cammy, Ken, Kim. Frame traps + tick throws + safe pressure.

Zoner.notes: JP, Guile, Dhalsim. Trap setters + projectiles + anti-airs.

Grappler.notes: Manon, Marisa, Zangief. Command grabs + frame traps to setup grabs.

Charge Specialist.notes: Guile, Dee Jay, Honda. Charge inputs reward patient defense.

rookie_iron: Mashing reversal DP on every blockstring
Not punishing -8 or worse moves on block
bronze_silver: Sub-optimal Drive resource use — burning all 6 bars in one combo
Wrong button after Drive Rush — too slow for combo confirm
Missing Drive Parry timing on obvious projectiles
gold_plus: Bad SA3 timing — using before opponent is in punishable state
Wrong combo route ending position (corner vs midscreen)

review_template.style: Specific over generic. Reference visible HUD elements, in-game timers, and concrete tactical concepts. Never say "play smart" or "use abilities better".

vocabulary: standard tactical vocabulary varies by game; defer to game_meta.character_vocab and key_mechanics for terms
